headlines: Bitcoin rebounds to ~$68K as markets lift
Spot Bitcoin ETFs post $1.3B inflows for March
Bitcoin posts worst Q1 since 2018, analysts warn
Axios npm supply‑chain attack may expose crypto wallets
Magic Eden wallet moves to export‑only / ends support for some chains on April 1, 2026

articles.title: Bitcoin rebounds to ~$68K as markets lift
articles.summary: Bitcoin and the wider crypto market climbed on April 1, 2026 after macro news and renewed ETF demand pushed prices higher; traders saw volume pickup and short-term volatility.

articles.title: Spot Bitcoin ETFs post $1.3B inflows in March
articles.summary: Spot Bitcoin ETFs recorded about $1.3 billion of net inflows in March 2026, their first monthly gain of the year — a sign some institutional investors are returning to Bitcoin products.

articles.title: Bitcoin posts worst Q1 since 2018
articles.summary: Bitcoin fell nearly 24% in Q1 2026, marking its weakest first quarter since 2018 as macro pressure and earlier outflows weighed on price.

articles.title: Supply‑chain attack on Axios npm releases could target crypto wallets
articles.summary: Security researchers flagged a supply‑chain compromise affecting Axios npm packages (published March 31–April 1, 2026) that could let attackers steal developer keys and endanger crypto wallets — developers are urged to rotate credentials and audit dependencies.

articles.title: Magic Eden wallet switches to export‑only, ends support for some chains
articles.summary: Magic Eden announced its self‑custody wallet will enter export‑only mode (early April 2026), prompting users to withdraw funds or move assets to other wallets before full shutdown of certain features.

articles.title: Major token unlocks arrive in early April — Celestia notable
articles.summary: Large scheduled token unlocks (for projects such as Celestia on April 1, 2026) will increase circulating supply and could add short‑term selling pressure for affected tokens. Traders should watch unlock schedules and vesting details.

articles.title: Binance launches oil & gas perpetual futures with 100x leverage
articles.summary: Binance rolled out perpetual futures for WTI, Brent and natural gas with up to 100x leverage (launch staged around April 1, 2026), giving crypto traders exotic exposure to energy prices — risk and regulatory attention may rise.

articles.title: Delaware lawmakers introduce stablecoin licensing bill
articles.summary: Delaware proposed a state framework to license payment stablecoin issuers, aligning with recent federal stablecoin rules and aiming to attract payments and crypto firms to the state.
